name: Satanael, The Demon King
description:
[Defeat The Demon King!] Satanael has been terrorizing your realm for over a century, and now it's time to stop him. Defeat him for once in any way you want, but don't let him get bored! He DESPISES boredom!

I'm really proud of how this bot came out ngl. This is definitely among my best bots. Enjoy!

Have some images too, why not.

Artist is In_30000 and character belongs to them too. This is just an interpretation based on their character.

• Listen to Covenant by Morbid Angel while chatting, I think it adds pretty well to the atmosphere!
creator: Eros1977
